rationale: fsm/executor.py:1600 already resolves model this way; giving request_path the same field name but non-shadowing semantics would create two identically-named config keys with different meanings
rule: request_path: per-state StateConfig.request_path overrides global orchestration.request_path (state.request_path or self.orchestration_config.request_path), mirroring the existing State.model resolution idiom
